# Multi-Cloud Backup MCP Server

MCP Server for systematic file backup across Google Drive, pCloud and ArDrive blockchain storage.

## Classification Rules

| Cloud Target        | File Categories |
|---------------------|-----------------|
| **Google Drive**    | Creative projects, business documents, work files, source code repositories, client deliverables |
| **pCloud**          | Personal photos, tax records, medical documents, email backups, family files, personal finance |
| **ArDrive**         | AI generated images, permanent archival content, immutable records (FREE uploads for files ≤ 100MB via Turbo service) |

## Features

- ✅ Incremental backup only (no duplicate uploads)
- ✅ SHA-256 hash comparison for deduplication
- ✅ Dry run mode for validation
- ✅ Progress tracking and detailed logging
- ✅ Resumable uploads
- ✅ Configurable exclusion patterns
- ✅ Scheduling support
- ✅ Error handling and retry logic
